title: phragmites communis subsp. nigricans
intro: Phragmites communis subsp. nigricans, also known as black needle rush, is a subspecies of the common reed plant that is native to Europe, Asia, and Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of black needle rush include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and relieving symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory problems. Black needle rush can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat a variety of ailments.
